body: As far as I can tell the property `longname` isn't really standard. According to [CF-coventions](https://cfconventions.org/Data/cf-conventions/cf-conventions-1.7/build/ch03s03.html) the property should be called `long_name`. This will make several more things work out of box now, like `xarray` plot naming (as expected when sticking to conventions).
title: Changes property "longname" to "long_name" for NetCDFOutputWriter
